Test Obfuscation and Optimization Edge Cases

Obf: opaque_predicate = 20
Obf: instruction_substitution = 225
Obf: string_encryption = 63
Opt: tail_call_optimized = 500500
Opt: non_tail_call = 5050
Opt: vectorized_loop = 72
Opt: link_time_optimization = 20
Edge: division_by_zero = 1
Edge: null_pointer_deref = 41
Edge: buffer_overflow = 30
Edge: integer_overflow = 2000000000
